title: Generate localparam flagged as unused by lint mode.

features.name: localparam inside generate case block
features.description: Code should include a generate case statement that assigns a localparam value based on a module parameter, where the localparam is referenced via scoped access outside the generate block
features.snippet:
generate
  case (SAMPLE_SIZE)
    24: begin : BIT_COUNTER
      localparam MAX = 5'd23;
    end
  endcase
endgenerate

features.name: scoped localparam reference via generate block name
features.description: Code should include a reference to a localparam defined inside a generate block using the generate block's scope name in a comparison expression
